channel.title: embedding on Mohammad Aziz
channel.description: Recent content in embedding on Mohammad Aziz

item.title: How to Use Embedding to Write Cleaner Code in Go?
item.description: Abstract Go is cleaner because it doesn’t support many of the features that tradition OO languages support. Less is more. Inheritance is one of those features but Go has a different style which can fulfil the necessity of inheritance. It’s called Embedding. What is embedding You can “borrow” the functionality of a struct or interface into another struct and interface respectively is called embedding. You can not embed an interface into a struct or vice versa.
